title: Atmosphereless
description: A Visual Datapack that makes the Overworld visually, Atmosphereless. Observe the stars during the Day!
body:
![Atmosphereless](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95903d299333df9d384089949d33eb6e0421edf7_0.webp)

Experience the Overworld like there were no Atomosphere.
> This is a Datapack/Mod that is to be installed on the Server's end. Requires **No** ~~Resource Packs~~

# Atmosphereless
Atmosphereless is an Experimental Datapack which utilizes the newest in Minecraft Features to make the Overworld feel Atomospherless. This is a **Visual Only** Datapack that is completely replaceable & *Should* have no affect on the Vanilla Gameplay of a World.

> This Datapack uses Experimental Features in Minecraft, Be cautious on using this outside of specified versions. To avoid experimental messages on joining worlds, please use [this Mod.](https://modrinth.com/mod/hide-experimental-warning)


## Effects
- Custom Colored Sky Light (Daytime is more Yellow, Night Time is Darker & Bluer)
- Darkened Fog & Skys during the Day (Still Darker at Night)
- No Sunsets
- Brighter Stars & Visible During the Day
- Clouds are disabled

## Visual Example
![Day Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2FXFFNhi/images/b40a2da75e479e7bc0f55b8b0367d42ad503bb33.png)
